title: H&M India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: H&M India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with H&M India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About H&M India:
H&M India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H&M India!
